product_overview: KalaSetu is a digital ecosystem for Indian art that connects collectors with verified artisans through a marketplace and role-based dashboards. The app also supports user authentication and artwork browsing for discovering available pieces.
core_goals: Create an account and sign in to access the platform
Browse the marketplace to discover artworks
View artwork details from the public marketplace
Access authenticated dashboard experiences after login

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can register a new account or sign in with Firebase Authentication to access protected areas of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit signup form -> See authenticated access enabled
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form with invalid credentials -> See error message

features.name: Marketplace Browsing
features.description: Users can browse the public marketplace to explore artworks and open an artwork detail view.
user_flows: Navigate to /marketplace -> Scroll through artwork list -> Open an artwork -> See artwork details

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and signup via Firebase Auth
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Marketplace Browsing
user_interactions: Click on an artwork to view details
